title: senecio navicularis
intro: Senecio navicularis, also known as Narrow-leafed Ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Senecio navicularis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce fever. Senecio navicularis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, but it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it, as it may cause liver damage at high doses.
